Attaches a ball and chain to Isaac's ankle that blocks projectiles and deals 5 damage per tick (~10.7 damage per second). If the ball is moving fast enough, it will destroy any Obstacles it comes into contact with (aside from Iron Blocks).
warunek: Complete the Boss Rush as Samson

opis: Spawns a familiar that cycles between the tears of Isaac's other familiars. If no familiars are present, Mongo Baby will fire normal tears that deal 3.5 damage. Mongo Baby shoots once every half second. Mongo Baby shoots once every 1/3rd of a second, shooting at the same speed as Isaac at base tears.

Each tear shot by the player increases item charge by one. Upon use, fires 8 tears around Isaac, which retain the damage, range, shot speed, and most special tear effects of his tears. Tears from this item have a +5 flat damage bonus.

Teleports Isaac to the Treasure Room, the Secret Room, the Super Secret Room or I AM ERROR. There is also a 1% chance of teleporting into a Black Market. The chances for each main destination are equal.
warunek: Complete the Boss Rush as Eden

opis: Detaches Isaac's head from his body and turns the head into a stationary familiar that fires tears for the current room. The player still controls Isaac's headless body, which also shoots tears. The body constantly spews a controllable fountain of blood shots, dealing about 0.66x-1.01x damage. The blood fountain can be aimed in any direction like Analog Stick.

Holding the active item button will deplete the charge bar. As the charge gets closer to zero, Isaac turns bluer over time. Once the charge bar hits zero, Isaac will become invincible to all outside sources of damage. If the button is held for an additional second after hitting zero, Isaac will take damage for every second the button is held down.

If the character has half a red heart or no red hearts after taking damage, it triggers the Book of Shadows effect, creating a shield that nullifies all types of damage for 5 seconds. Allows entrance into Chest after beating Isaac in the Cathedral by touching the chest. Opens A Strange Door in Depths II and its variants that leads to Mausoleum/Gehenna II.

If the character has half a red heart or no red hearts after taking damage, it triggers The Necronomicon effect, damaging all enemies in the room. Allows entrance into the Dark Room after beating Satan in Sheol by touching the chest. +1 damage. Opens A Strange Door in Depths II and its variants that leads to Mausoleum/Gehenna II.
Instead of firing tears, Isaac controls one floating tear that hovers over obstacles. This tear deals constant damage when held in place over an enemy. +0.2 shot speed⁺

Reduces tear delay by the formula: (delay / 4) - 2 Multiplies fire rate / divides tear delay by 5.5x 0.2x damage multiplier. 0.5x tear size multiplier. -0.3 tear size. Drastically reduces knockback from Isaac's tears.

+0.5 Damage. -0.3 Tears. -0.3 Shot Speed. +1.2 Range. +0.8 Tear Falling Speed. Grants homing tears. Tears gain a damaging aura. The aura deals 30% of Isaac's damage 15 times per second. The aura deals 2 damage 30 times per second.
warunek: Earn all 5 / 9 (except Ultra Greed) / 10 / 12 Completion Marks on Hard mode as The Lost

opis: Upon dying, resurrect as Lazarus Risen in the current room with one Red Heart container and Anemic. Upon dying, resurrect as Lazarus Risen in the current room with one less Red Heart container (but no less than 1), Anemic, and a permanent +0.5 Damage up. Going to the next floor reverts him back into Lazarus, with his inherent extra life effect.
Grants the combined effects of the Blue Map, Treasure Map, and The Compass, revealing the floor layout and all special rooms, including Secret Rooms and Super Secret Rooms.
Adds three full Red Heart Containers.

Grants two Soul Hearts. Isaac gains a pulsing blue aura that repels enemies and projectiles. The power of the repel force alternates in strength at random, sometimes strong enough to counter a projectile well before it hits Isaac, sometimes only strong enough to slow it down. Ground-based enemies will overcome the counterforce easier than flying enemies and projectiles.
warunek: Defeat The Lamb as The Lost

opis: Grants piercing and spectral tears. +0.25 range. -1.5 range. -0.4 shot speed. -0.5 tear falling speed. Tear size multiplier: 1.5x. +0.22 tear size.

Every 4th newly discovered room, slows all enemies by 50% and their attacks down to half their normal speed, but has a ~13% chance of speeding them up by 40% instead. The effect is lost upon leaving the room, and not gained again if re-entering it.

On use, Isaac readies the Boomerang. Pressing a fire key will throw it in the chosen direction, and it will return shortly afterward. Any pickups hit will return to Isaac with the Boomerang. Enemies hit by it will take double Isaac's current damage and are petrified for about 2 seconds. Boomerang pierces enemies it hits.
Grants 1 Black Heart. +5.25 range. +2.5 range. +0.5 tear falling speed. +0.16 shot speed.
+0.3 speed. Decreases Isaac's size, making him less likely to be hit. Upon pickup, gives Isaac a random pill. If he is already holding a consumable, it is forcibly dropped to the ground.
+0.7 tears. +0.16 shot speed.

cytat: HP + tears up + shot speed down
opis: Grants one full Red Heart container. Heals Isaac for 1 additional Red Heart. +0.7 tears. -0.16 shot speed.
Grants 1 Soul Heart. +1 luck. Spawns 2 Keys.

Grants Isaac one Black Heart. Spawns three Bombs near Isaac. The bombs can be of any type that can naturally spawn, including Troll Bombs and Mega Troll Bombs. They spawn with their usual drop chance. Outside of Greed Mode, spawns the if it hasn't yet been encountered.
+1 damage. +5.25 range. +2.5 range. +0.5 tear falling speed.
Grants one full Red Heart container. Heals 1 additional Red Heart.
Duplicates all pickups and pedestal items in the current room, then disappears.
Mimics the effect of Isaac's held pill. Mimics the effect of Isaac's held pill. Placebo's recharge time changes upon use, depending on the pill Isaac was holding when he used it.

When used, has a roughly 60% chance to drop a penny, nickel or dime. The exact chances are 50% for a penny, 5% for a nickel, 1% for a dime and 44% for nothing. The exact chances are 52% for a penny, 6% for a nickel, 1% for a dime and 41% for nothing.

Upon entering a room, creates a green fog effect and all enemies are poisoned. The poison ticks 2 times. The poison ticks 4 times on normal enemies and 2 times on bosses. Killing enemies leaves a small, short-lasting pool of green creep on the ground. The creep deals 1 damage per tick or 30 damage per second.

Petrifies all enemies in the current room for about 1.5 seconds. Deals 5 damage and poisons any enemies near Isaac. The poison deals Isaac's damage per tick and lasts for 6 ticks Sends out a wave of rocks across the room in the direction Isaac is facing, dealing 10 damage to any enemies it comes in contact with.

Fires a single high-damage piercing tear which can travel over obstacles. The damage dealt by this tear is ten times Isaac's damage, plus a flat 10 damage. The shot has an additional 1.5x size multiplier on top of damage-increased size. Sets Isaac's health to half a heart with each use (half a Soul Heart if these are present but there are no Red Heart containers).

Grants 5 bombs. Causes bombs to explode in a large cross-shaped blast by adding two additional explosions in each cardinal direction. The damage for a single explosion is unchanged (60) 0.75x times its normal damage (resulting in 75 damage per explosion). Each successive explosion that hits the same enemy has its damage halved.

cytat: HP up. Don't swallow the prize!
opis: Grants one full Red Heart container. Heals 1 additional red heart. Spawns one random trinket.
+1.25 range. +2.5 range. +0.5 tear falling speed. +1 luck. Grants one Soul Heart.
Causes eligible activated items to activate twice on each use. Of the 171 activated items, 45% – 77 items – are not eligible.
Upon use, it adds one copy of each of Isaac's familiars for the duration of the current room. If Isaac has no familiars, a Demon Baby will spawn for the duration of the current room.
Isaac fires tears from both eyes at the same time. Isaac's tears are fired diagonally outwards, similar to the effect of the R U a Wizard? pill. Isaac's tears become spectral.
+1.5 damage. Isaac's tears are replaced with nails, which have increased knockback.

Spawns a demonic familiar that copies Isaac's tears with reduced size (or width for some special attacks). Incubus' tears ignores Isaac's range and shot speed. Incubus' damage is reduced by 25% when playing as characters other than Lilith and Tainted Lilith.

Spawns a familiar that fires tears with the same damage and tear effects as Isaac's tears. Fires at half the normal fire rate of a familiar. The familiar is not affected by range/ tear height, only tear falling speed.
Spawns a chest familiar that has a 25% chance to spawn a pickup and a 10% chance to spawn a trinket after clearing a room. The possible rewards are: Red Heart Lil' Battery Trinkets

Spawns an orbital familiar that blocks enemy shots and deals 7 damage per tick or 105 damage per second on contact ( 53 damage per second). It also attracts enemy shots to itself, making them more likely to be blocked. A shot actively being attracted can no longer damage Isaac and is essentially nullified, but if it slips outside the Protector's range, it can again deal damage.
Spawns a white fly familiar that slowly orbits Isaac and deals 3 damage per tick or 45 damage per second on contact.

Spawns a fly familiar that moves in a straight line and attaches itself to the first wall or obstacle it comes into contact within each room. The Lost Fly will then move around the room functionally similar to the Guts. If any enemies walk into its path, it will deal 7 contact damage per tick or 105 damage per second.

cytat: We put bombs in your bombs!
opis: Gives Isaac +5 bombs. Isaac's bombs split into 2-4 tiny bombs after exploding. Isaac's bombs split into 4-5 tiny bombs after exploding. Tiny bombs deal half damage and have decreased blast radius. Tiny bombs retain most of Isaac's bomb synergies. Tiny bombs explode immediately upon landing.
+5 bombs. Bombs stick to enemies. Spawns Blue Spiders when one of Isaac's bombs kills the enemy it has stuck to. Bombs leave a puddle of slowing white creep on the ground when they explode.

Tear delay gradually decreases as the player shoots in one direction. Accuracy also decreases as the fire rate increases. At max "charge", it will reduce tear delay by half, rounding down. Fire rate gradually increases as the player shoots in one direction. Accuracy also decreases as the fire rate increases.
Grants spectral tears. When tears travel off-screen, they loop back around through the opposite wall. +2.25 range. +3 range. +1.5 tear falling speed.

+0.7 tears. +5.25 range. +2.5 range. +0.5 tear falling speed. Spawns a combination of 3 Red Hearts, Soul Hearts or Black Hearts on the floor when picked up. These hearts are not subject to the Red/Soul/Black Heart chances; each type has an equal chance to spawn.
Upon taking damage, spawns six Troll Bombs around the room, similar to the effect of XVI - The Tower.

Spawns a battery familiar that, while the player is in an uncleared room, every 30 seconds, starting from the moment it has been picked up, does one of the following: Spawns a Lil' Battery. It does this a maximum of 2 times per room. Can also spawn a Micro Battery or Mega Battery instead. Adds a charge to Isaac's activated item. It does this a maximum of 2 times per room.

Isaac's damage increases for each successive tear hit on enemies. The multiplier increases by 0.25x for each hit, going up to a maximum of 2x after 4 successive hits. If a tear misses and hits nothing (wall/floor), there is a chance for the multiplier to be reset back to 1. The chance is 20% for the first miss, 33% for the second miss, and 50% for the third miss and beyond.

Isaac has a chance to fire a glowing blue tear that, after colliding with an enemy, spawns a damaging beam of light (similar to Crack the Sky). Each beam of light deals quadruple (4×) Isaac's tear damage. Each beam of light deals triple (3×) Isaac's tear damage. The beam of light will damage all enemies in a small radius around it.

Enemy shots that hit Isaac have a 25% chance to be blocked. When a projectile is effectively blocked, Host Hat fires 3 bullets similar to the Host's. Bullets fired from Host Hat use Isaac's Damage and Range, and copy Isaac's Tear effects. The bullets do not use Isaac's Shot Speed. Can block: Fireballs (e.g. from Crackle), but their lines of fire harm Isaac.

Upon purchasing an item from the Shop, a new purchasable item is added to the store's inventory. Collectibles created correspond to the shop's item pool. Drops 3 random pickups around Isaac. Outside of Greed Mode, the restocked item's cost is increased after each purchase. For items, the price increase is 2 coins times the number of purchases.

Certain spider enemies no longer target or deal contact damage to Isaac, nor actively spawn other enemies. Spiders that are spawned from enemies that are not affected by Bursting Sack will also remain neutral. Affected spider enemies that deal no damage to Isaac whatsoever include: Baby Long Legs, Big Spider, Crazy Long Legs, Level 2 Spider, Small Baby Long Legs, Small Crazy Long Legs and Spider.

Holding any fire button/direction for 2.35 seconds causes Isaac to drop a free Butt Bombs bomb. This includes charging or directly controlled attacks. Only 1 Butt Bomb can be dropped per charging cycle, so it is required to stop firing and then charge again to drop another Butt Bomb. Taking Damage will interrupt the cycle.
Grants spectral tears. Tear size multiplier: 2x. +0.6 tear size.

+5 coins. Shops, Treasure Rooms, and Libraries must be opened with a Penny instead of a Key. These doors appear identical to Arcade doors. All locked doors, Locked chests, and Key Blocks must be opened with a Penny instead of Keys, including those that require 2 keys to open.

cytat: Tears up + your future shines brighter
opis: +0.7 tears up. Grants a random item at the start of the next run.

Once thrown, the Friendly Ball will instantly capture any non-boss enemy it hits, removing them from the room. Walking over a Friendly Ball after it captures an enemy will instantly recharge the item. The next time the Friendly Ball is thrown, it will release the previously captured enemy as a friendly enemy.

Once activated, all tears in the air split into 6 more tears in all directions, which retain their damage and shot speed. Luck-based effects from items such as Tough Love or Holy Light are applied individually to each tear.

Spawns a familiar that can be launched in the direction the player is firing after a short charge-up period. At full charge, it initially deals 6 damage per tick or 90 damage per second, but quickly drops towards 0 the slower the familiar moves. No longer deals damage per tick, instead deals a fix amount of damage depending on charge level, at lowest being ~5 and at max being ~20.

Spawns a familiar which follows Isaac and picks up any nearby coins. Bumbo changes level based on the amount of coins it's collected. 30px|link= Level 1 (0-5 coins): Bumbo just collects coins to level up. 30px|link= Level 2 (6-11 coins): Bumbo occasionally drops a pickup, trinket, chest or pedestal item after a room clear.

Re-rolls Rocks and Metal Blocks in the current room into Poops, other Metal Blocks, other Rocks, and/or TNT. Poops of any type and TNT cannot be re-rolled, although other obstacles may be rerolled into them. Also re-rolls Poops, Spikes, Fire Places, both types of TNT, Cobwebs, and Pillars.
Spawns a familiar projecting a circular aura that slows enemies and enemy shots within its radius and for a short period once they exit.

Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and collects keys, dropping random Chests in return. Spawns almost exclusively chests, red chests, and locked chests, with a very slim chance to spawn another type of chest or a grab bag.
Spawns a familiar that drops a random rune after clearing enough rooms. Runes are dropped alternating every 5 or 6 rooms. Runes are dropped alternating every 7 or 8 rooms.
Spawns an angel familiar who follows Isaac and fires homing tears similar to Sacred Heart, which deal 10 damage at 75% shot speed.

Upon taking damage, all enemies in the room are charmed. It won't trigger if there are less than 2 enemies in the room. Enemies are able to damage each other with projectiles. If an enemy is damaged by another enemy, they will attack that enemy instead of Isaac.
Gives Isaac a random Zodiac item effect that changes each floor. (Rep+) Grants +0.25 speed on pickup.
warunek: Defeat Ultra Greed as The Lost

opis: Grants a 15% chance to fire poison tears, each tick dealing damage equal to Isaac's. Poison from the shots will tick 2 times. Inflicts poison on enemies who make contact with Isaac. Contact poison will tick 6 times. Enemies who are killed after they have been inflicted with this type of poison have a 20% chance to drop black hearts. Enemies can still drop black hearts after the poison has worn off.
Creates a controllable crosshair. Isaac automatically and continuously fires towards the crosshair. The crosshair will not appear in each room until Isaac fires.

Isaac's tears are replaced with ring-shaped lasers. Shots can be charged to increase the size of the rings. The rings deal damage 15 times per second. Only the outer circumference of the rings will deal damage. Rings pass through obstacles and enemies. Rings have infinite range and will travel until they hit a wall.

When used for the first time, Isaac creates a blue portal under where he is standing. The next time he uses the item, he creates an orange portal. Isaac can then walk over either of the portals to teleport instantly to the location of the other one. Activating the item more than twice will replace the older of the two portals.

Isaac emits a beam in the direction that his head is facing. Isaac's tears travel in the path of the beam. When Isaac moves or turns his head, tears that are mid-flight will remain within the beam. +0.5 Tears. +1.0 Fire Rate. +5.25 Range. +2.5 Range. +0.5 Tear Falling Speed. +0.16 Shot Speed.

Tears now have a 10% chance to apply a shrinking effect, causing enemies to shrink in size and also run away from Isaac. Shrunk enemies can be crushed and killed by walking over them. The shrinking effect lasts 5 seconds.

+1.0 damage. After firing tears for 2.35 seconds, releasing the fire button unleashes a black Brimstone ring around Isaac that expands and contracts, dealing damage at a rapid rate to all enemies touching it. The black ring deals damage equal to Isaac's current damage per tick, and ticks a total of 30 times. It lasts ~1.97 seconds (118 frames).

Gives Isaac a spear familiar that he holds in the direction he most recently shot. The spear does twice Isaac's damage per tick (~8.57 times Isaac's damage per second). The spear occasionally inflicts fear on enemies it damages.
Isaac's tears have a 25% chance to stick to enemies and explode a few seconds afterward, dealing 60 damage plus Isaac's tear damage.

Drops 1-6 random pickups around Isaac. Causes items to be chosen from random item pools. Fixed item drops that ignore the current room's item pool will not be replaced. Examples include Cube of Meat after defeating one of The Harbingers as a floor boss, or the Small Rock after breaking a Tinted Rock.

Spawns a grey spider familiar that wanders around and allows Isaac to see tear damage and the health bars of all enemies. The spider will inflict a random status effect on any enemies it comes into contact with. The spider will sometimes drop a Lil' Battery or spawn a Blue Spider when a room is completed.

Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac around and blocks enemy projectiles. Upon blocking a shot, it has a 10% chance of farting. There are three possible fart effects: Charms all nearby enemies. Poisons all nearby enemies. Knocks back nearby enemies and hostile tears.

Spawns a familiar that bounces diagonally around the room, deals 8 damage per tick or 120 damage per second and applies a random status effect to enemies it comes in contact with. The familiar also has a chance to re-roll pickups that it passes over into other pickups, chests, or items, in an uncleared room only (with at least one enemy alive).
Re-rolls Isaac's damage, tear delay (or fire rate), range, and speed. Each stat is given a multiplier, ranging from 0.5x to 2.0x, which applies after all other adjustments.

Grants a random aura around Isaac that grants a boost depending on the aura's color: Red: +4 damage. Blue: -4 tear delay. Blue: +2.0 fire rate. Yellow: +0.5 speed. Also affects maximum speed (may never exceed 2.0). Orange: +7.5 range, +1.0 tear falling speed. Orange: +3.0 range. Taking damage causes the aura to disappear. When the next room is entered, the aura will reappear with a random color.

When Isaac takes damage, a black ring briefly appears around him, dealing tear damage at a rapid rate to everything touching it. When an enemy is killed with the black ring, there is a 15% chance for it to drop a Black Heart. Black Hearts will drop as soon as the enemy is killed. (In other words, the heart will drop at the beginning of the death animation rather than at the end of the death animation.)

Grants 2 Black Hearts on pickup. When Isaac has no Red Hearts at any given moment, grant the following until Isaac leaves the room: Flight. If the room is not completed yet: Every 40 seconds starting with 00:00 in-game timer (00:00 → 00:40 → 01:20 → 02:00... etc.), trigger a shield for 10 seconds. The effects persist through rooms if Isaac doesn't gain Red Hearts.

Isaac will occasionally fire a slow-moving eye with an infinite range that fires tears identical to Isaac's tears. The eyes fire in the direction they are traveling in. The eyes fire in the same direction as Isaac.
Each time an enemy is killed, Isaac gains a damage boost for the current room. Each kill increases damage by 0.5, up to a maximum of 5 damage after 10 kills.

Upon taking damage a certain number of times, Isaac gains a permanent demonic familiar. Possible familiars include: Dark Bum Demon Baby Incubus Lil Brimstone Succubus Lil Abaddon Twisted Pair The first and second familiars will each spawn after taking damage 15 times. The third and fourth familiars will each spawn after taking damage 30 more times. No further familiars will spawn.

Upon picking up 15 heart pickups, Isaac gains a permanent angelic familiar and generates a Soul Heart drop. Possible familiars include: Holy Water Guardian Angel Sworn Protector The Relic Seraphim All five familiars will spawn in a random order. Isaac will look progressively more pregnant as he collects heart pickups.
warunek: Complete the Boss Rush as Lilith

opis: Two item pedestals are presented in every Treasure Room. Only one can be taken; the other will disappear.

Grants 2 Soul Hearts. Replaces normal tears with blue diamond tears while all of Isaac's Red Heart containers and Bone Hearts (if any) are full. This includes whenever Isaac has zero Red Heart containers. Containers can be filled with Rotten Hearts and still activate the effect. The coin health containers of Keeper and Tainted Keeper count as red heart containers for the purposes of this item.

Allows Isaac to carry two cards or pills (or a combination of both) at the same time. Increases the coin cap to 999. If a room would otherwise yield no reward, 1-3 random coins will spawn. All coins spawned will be of the same type.

Spawns a familiar that bounces around the room and has a dark aura around it. Enemies within the radius of the aura take damage. The aura deals 30% of Isaac's damage per tick or about 129% of Isaac's damage per second. The aura deals 2.5 damage per tick or about 7.5-10 damage per second. If Isaac is within the aura, his tears gain a 1.5× damage multiplier.

Each tear that Isaac fires gains a random effect. The possible effects are: Anti-Gravity Ball of Bandages (Level 4) Ball of Tar Bumbo (Level 3) The Common Cold Compound Fracture Continuum Cricket's Body Cupid's Arrow Euthanasia Explosivo Eye of Belial Eye of Greed Eye of the Occult Fire Mind Flat Stone
Teleports Isaac to a room that has not been explored yet. Normal rooms are prioritized over special rooms, and common special rooms take priority over rarer ones.
Walking in a circle will spawn an inverse pentacle symbol on the floor, which deals 10 damage per tick to enemies within it. This does not affect flying enemies.
Upon use, Isaac farts, charming all nearby enemies. The cloud deals 5 damage.

On use, Isaac will be returned to the previous room and everything that happened in the current room will be undone. Health, bombs, coins, keys, cards/runes/pills, items, and trinkets will be restored. Score and Time will reset, but about one second will be spent in an unskippable animation after use.

Surrounds Isaac with a large white halo. Once per second, the halo deals Isaac's Damage to all enemies currently inside it. Each enemy shot has a 30% chance to be reflected by the halo. The chance is predetermined, and not affected by how long it is exposed by the halo.

Pennys have a 10% chance to be replaced with Grab Bags. Bombs, Keys, Cards, Runes, and Lil' Battery have a 20% chance. This includes pickups spawned by most sources: room rewards, chests, slot machines, special shopkeepers, Greed Mode waves, etc. Coins bombed out of a can become sacks. The exception to this are pickups spawned by Isaac himself directly, e.g.

A cone of light shines from Isaac's chest that slows all enemies and enemy shots. The light will face the direction Isaac is moving. The light doesn't affect bosses, but it will slow their shots. The slow effect will disappear from enemies when the light stops shining on them, but shots will remain slow.
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac's movement with a 3-second delay and deals 2 contact damage to enemies per tick (30 damage per second). The fly follows Isaac on a 0.66 second delay instead.

Upon use, spawns a Movable TNT. If used a second time while the created TNT is still active, it will explode. This will consume a charge to remotely detonate the TNT instead of creating another TNT. The remote detonation can be used while the item is uncharged.
Grants four Soul Hearts. Heals 12 Hearts.
Isaac's tears become coins. Hitting an enemy with tears has a 5% chance to drop a Penny at the point of impact. The chance is not affected by Luck.

Spawns a blue fly familiar that will follow Isaac's movement with a 1-second delay and fires tears at nearby enemies. Papa fly follows Isaac on a 0.66 second delay instead. Papa Fly's tears deal Isaac's damage, and are fired once per second.

Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac's path with a 2-second delay. The delay is 0.66 seconds instead. When a friendly tear passes through Multidimensional Baby, the tear splits into two parallel tears that gain a 1.33x shot speed boost, x1.5 range / x1.5 tear height (which also increases effective range), and also a visual black and white flashing effect.

Grants 5 bombs. Isaac's bombs have a 25% chance to spawn a pickup or trinket when they explode including other bombs. Isaac's bombs have a 63% chance to spawn a pickup or trinket when they explode, but the chance for either to generate decreases by 1% for each spawn until Isaac enters a new floor. This is to prevent items such as Dr. Fetus or a Golden Bomb from providing unlimited resources.

Upon taking damage, inflicts fear on all enemies in the room. Upon taking damage, spawns a dark friendly My Shadow which deal 5 damage per hit to enemies. Spawns a shadow familiar that mimics Isaac's movements on a very brief delay. It spawns a friendly My Shadow whenever an enemy comes into contact with it.
Killing an enemy adds a fly to the jar, up to a maximum of 20. Upon use, releases Blue Flies equal to the number of flies in the jar.

Spawns a familiar that looks like Loki and follows Isaac, firing tears in all four cardinal directions that deal 3.5 damage. Lil Loki shoots once per second. Lil Loki shoots once every 3/4ths of a second.

Spawns a glass familiar that follows Isaac and spills on the floor upon taking damage. In Repentance+, the familiar blocks projectiles. After blocking 10 projectiles, the glass will break and give Isaac a Tears up for the remainder of the floor.
Upon use, it restarts the room and respawns all enemies. Pickups or Chests may be granted for clearing the room.
Grants one Soul Heart. +0.75 tears. Decreases Isaac's size. Increases the pitch of Isaac's voice.

Increases luck by 1 and doubles the effects of certain trinkets while held. When used, drops a random trinket on the ground. In Repentance+, almost every trinket got a buffed effect while Mom's Box is carried.

-0.2 speed and maximum speed. -15 range. -17 range. +2.0 tear falling speed. The increased tear falling speed and decreased range results in slightly increased firing distance. The increased tear falling speed and decreased range results in nearly identical firing distance. Occasionally, Isaac will become unable to fire tears.
warunek: Complete The Guardian (challenge #30) Complete Onan's Streak (challenge #29)

opis: Upon use, Isaac fires a giant, incredibly powerful blood laser, similar to the one used by Mega Satan, for 15 seconds. The beam deals Isaac's current damage multiplied by 5 per tick. The beam has enough power to push Isaac backward while being fired and will last between rooms, and across multiple floors.
warunek: Defeat Mega Satan as every character ( except Tainted characters)

opis: When at exactly 1 Red Heart, some of Isaac's stats are increased. +0.75 tears. +2.0 fire rate. The bonus can break the soft tears cap. +1.5 range. +1 tear falling speed. +0.2 shot speed. The effect is lost any time Isaac gains or loses Red Hearts. The crown will glow red while active; if inactive, it will appear black.
Adds a chance to fire razor blades that deal quadruple Isaac's tear damage. +0.3 tears.

After every 15 tears fired, Isaac will fire a low range burst of 12 tears at once, in a similar fashion to Monstro's Lung. Tears in the barrage deal double damage. Tears will fire only from Isaac's right eye. Fired tears have a 50% chance to be colored red.

+0.3 damage. +0.1 speed. Also affects maximum speed (may never exceed 2.0). When entering a room connected to an undiscovered Secret Room or Super Secret Room, a howl sound effect will play. A barking sound will play if there is an undiscovered Crawl Space in the room.

While firing, creates an aura around Isaac that poisons any nearby enemies for 2 ticks. The poison may stack up to 6 ticks at a time. The aura range is approximately two tiles. Poison damage is equal to Isaac's damage stat.

Firing without a pause for 7.5 seconds creates a small brown cloud that damages enemies who walk through it. The damage is equal to Isaac's base tear damage, dealt roughly 5 times per second. The clouds can be moved by shooting them. The clouds only last for 15 seconds, meaning a maximum of two can be active at any given time.

Adds a 25% chance to drop a full Red Heart upon taking damage. Adds a separate 10% chance to gain the Anemic effect (+5 range, red creep trail) for the current room upon taking damage. Taking damage will cause Isaac to bleed, spewing blood tears around him constantly. Damage may include self-sacrifice damage such as the .

Grants one Soul Heart. Enemy shots that hit Isaac have a 25% chance to be reflected. Isaac does not take damage from the reflected tears, but gets pushed a bit. The reflected tears are homing and concussive, and use Isaac's Damage and Tear effects. Projectiles that create other projectiles (e.g. Shady) can harm Isaac and be reflected.

Adds a golden tear every 20 tears fired, which causes enemies to turn gold and petrifies them for a few seconds (similar to Midas' Touch) at the cost of one Penny. Golden tears can still be fired if Isaac has no money. Unlike other tear effects, golden tears are fired alongside regular tears rather than replacing a regular tear.
Drops a random card or rune on pickup. Adds an extra effect to a card, rune, or other card-like pickup. Adds an extra effect to certain tarot cards.

When Isaac gets hit, 10 tears are fired in a circle around him (similar to Tammy's Head). Tears spawned on hit have a +25 damage bonus. When Isaac gets hit, has a chance to activate the Anemic effect for 2 seconds. The effect doesn't seem affected by luck.

Tears turn into bones, which shatter into 1-3 shards upon hitting an obstacle or enemy, which each deal 50% of Isaac's Damage. Unlike The Parasite, there is no damage minimum on splitting, but the tears can also split only once. The shards have a fixed size, about the same as a 3.5 damage tear, regardless of their Damage.
Allows Isaac to carry two cards, pills, or any combination of both. Spawns one random card, rune, or pill.
+1.5 range. +2.5 range. +1 tear falling speed Drops a Lucky Penny.
warunek: Defeat Ultra Greedier as The Lost

opis: Grants one full Red Heart container. Heals 1 additional Red Heart.

Grants a Soul Heart. Any damage dealt to Isaac has a 20% chance to be ignored. This includes damage through tears, contact, explosions, Curse Room, s, and s. Contact damage with enemies is difficult to avoid, as the damage negation does not provide invincibility frames. Isaac flashes briefly blue when damage is negated. The flash can occur even while invincible from taking a hit or using an invincibility effect.
Drops a random trinket. Grants a second trinket slot.

Adds a 20% chance to fire a booger tear that stick to the first enemy that they come in contact with and deals damage over time. Each booger deals damage equal to Isaac's tear damage every second. The booger lasts for 60 seconds or until the enemy dies. The booger lasts 10 seconds.

Adds a 5% chance to shoot concussive tears, causing enemies to walk around randomly. The confusion caused by Glaucoma tears is effectively permanent for normal enemies, and a very long duration compared to most status effects for bosses. Makes the screen darker.

Adds a chance to fire an egg sack which spawns slowing creep. If an egg sack hits an enemy, one to two Blue Flies or Blue Spider is spawned. Egg sack tears have x2 range/ x2 tear height (which also increases effective range).
+1.5 range. +1.0 tear falling speed. Grants piercing tears. After piercing one enemy, tears will gain double damage, homing, and a 1.3x size multiplier.
+0.3 damage. Adds a 25% chance to fire acidic tears that destroy obstacles and open doors (including Secret Room entrances) upon contact.

Grants 2 Soul Hearts. Modifies drops from Champion enemies depending on certain conditions. Also modifies room clear drops. The priorities of the drops, in order, are as follows: Soul Hearts: When Isaac has no Red Heart containers and less than 2 Soul Hearts. Full Red Hearts: While at 0.5 Red Hearts.

+0.35 tears up. Allows tears to be fired diagonally. With a keyboard or using buttons to fire with a controller, tears can be shot at 45-degree angles by holding two buttons. This is known as eight-directional firing. With an analog controller, the analog input is accepted, allowing full analog aiming in any direction.

In each room, the first enemy killed will release a gas explosion and poison nearby enemies. Poisoned enemies will also release gas upon death, spreading the effect. Poisoned enemies do not need to die while the poison is still active to spread the effect. The initial gas explosion deals 5 damage, and the poison deals Isaac's tear damage per tick, for 6 ticks.

Spawns a floating finger familiar that can be aimed with the fire buttons in all directions. The finger fires invisible spectral lasers, doing 10% of Isaac's Damage. The lasers fire 10 times per second and are not affected by Isaac's tear rate. The lasers have thickness based on Isaac's Damage, making it easier to inflict damage on higher Damage.

Grants a shadow familiar that follows Isaac's movements on a 1-second/ 0.66-second delay and deals 2/ 5 contact damage per tick, or 30/ 75 damage per second, to enemies. Shade is absorbed by Isaac after dealing over 600 damage over 666 damage. The familiar disappears and turns into friendly dark My Shadows, similar to those spawned by My Shadow.

Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and leaves a trail of blue creep that damages enemies. The creep deals 2 damage per tick or 6 damage per second to non-flying enemies. If the cloud touches an enemy, it has a small chance to spawn a damaging Holy Light beam onto the enemy. The light beams deal 20 + Isaac's tear damage per tick and may strike an enemy up to 8 times.

Spawns a Hush familiar that bounces diagonally around the room and deals contact damage to enemies. Hushy deals 2 damage per tick or 30 damage per second. While firing tears, Hushy stops moving. When Hushy stops moving, it can block shots and will shoot 8 tears out in all cardinal and ordinal directions. It fires once every 0.97 seconds, and each shot deals 6 damage

Spawns a small flying Monstro familiar that charges up and fires a large cluster of tears, similar to Monstro's main attack. It fires between 12 and 14 tears that do 3.5 damage each. It can do a minimum of 3.5 damage to 49 damage, depending on how many shots are fired and how many hit

Grants a familiar that follows Isaac and always appears first in the familiar chain. While firing tears, King Baby stops moving and glows white. When Isaac stops firing tears, King Baby moves rapidly back towards Isaac. While King Baby is stationary, other familiars remain stationary as well. This affects every familiar that has priority in how closely it follows behind Isaac.

Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and charges across the room when Isaac fires, dealing 2.7 damage per tick or 40.5 damage per second to enemies it comes in contact with. The familiar's charging speed is very slow, unlike its counterpart Little Chubby. The familiar blocks enemy shots.
This item is acquired when Isaac takes damage while holding Glass Cannon. It begins with no charges. Once fully charged, it automatically turns back into Glass Cannon.

Upon use, deals 9,999,999 damage to every enemy in the room, then kills Isaac 3 seconds later. In The Binding of Isaac: Repentance+, a 10 seconds timer instead of 3 for Mother and a 12 seconds timer for Delirium allows to kill them with a chance to get in the final chest without dying.

Duplicates 1 random pickup in the current room, including Cards, Runes, Chests, and trinkets. Duplicated pickups may not be identical to the original; for example, a duplicated card may be a different one than the original.

Upon use, destroys all pedestal items in the room. Items that require payment can not be absorbed unless they are bought first. If Void destroys an active item, it gains the activated ability of that item - whenever Void is used, it will simultaneously use all previous active items that were absorbed in the same order they were absorbed.

Stops all enemies including bosses until a fire button is pressed. This does not affect troll bombs. Touching frozen enemies will still damage Isaac. Co-op babies can fire without ending the effect. Stops Red Fire places/Purple Fire places from shooting projectiles. Bosses will resume their actions after 30 seconds have passed, while non-boss enemies (except Lil' Haunt) are still paused.

Upon use, any trinkets that Isaac is holding are destroyed, and their effects are permanently applied to him. Trinkets that are absorbed show up on the HUD's item tracker. Increases the chance for a trinket to drop after clearing a room. (Has a 2% chance to turn the pickup variant into a trinket.)
warunek: Defeat Mom's Heart or It Lives! on Hard mode as Apollyon

opis: Upon use, converts pickups within the current room to Blue Flies or Blue Spiders. Doubles Isaac's current amount of Blue Flies and Spiders. If Isaac has no Blue Flies or Spiders, spawns one Blue Fly or Spider.

For the current room, rotates every enemy and pickup 90 degrees and moves its sprite up and left. Enemy hitboxes remain the same. Using Dataminer in a room with items glitches all items, giving them 2-3 random effects, similar to TMTRAINER (only in Repentance+). Increases one of Isaac's stats and decreases another. Possible stat changes include:
Transforms Isaac into a random character and removes the last item collected (not including Clicker) or gulped trinket. All stat changes of the new character are applied.

Destroys all obstacles in the current room and deals 200 damage to every enemy (including Bosses). This effect also applies to every room for the remainder of the floor. Also destroys all Machines, s, Shopkeepers, and Fire Places. Also destroys all obstacles in rooms that have already been cleared. Will destroy s as well, reducing donated coin count and removing them for the rest of the run.

cytat: I can't believe it's not butter bean!
opis: Upon use, Isaac farts, knocking back enemies and their shots. It also sends out a circular rock wave around him that deal 10 damage per tick to nearby enemies and break obstacles. Shots deflected by Wait What? farts deal 6 damage if they would've hurt Isaac for half a heart, and 7 for a full heart.
Upon use, has a 50% chance to double all items, pickups, and chests in the current room. If the effect fails, the items, pickups, and chests disappear, and a penny is spawned.
Hurts Isaac without taking away health, activating any items that trigger upon taking damage.

On use: Removes one Red Heart Container. Increases damage by a flat +0.2. Grants one Cube of Meat. The Cube of Meat is not added as a real item in Isaac's inventory. Grants an active Anemic effect for the current room. Counts as self-damage for the purposes of damage-triggered items.
Grants a random item's effect for the current room.

Grants a random dice item that transforms into a different random dice item upon use. Each dice item has a 2 room charge. D infinity is able to use all the available effects, regardless of whether the individual dice mimicked by this item has been unlocked prior or not. Acts as any dice item except for Spindown Dice, and can be cycled through by pressing the drop key.
Upon activation, this item is consumed and will vanish from Isaac's inventory. Spawns two random item pedestals using the item pool of the current room.

Spawns a familiar that drops random pills. Acid Baby drops a pill every 3 cleared rooms. The first drop happens after 2 rooms. Acid Baby drops a pill every 7 cleared rooms. The first drop happens after 6 rooms. Upon using a pill, all enemies in the room will be poisoned. The poison lasts for 2 ticks.

+1 luck. Spawns a familiar that sporadically moves around the room. Upon entering a room with a Secret Room/Super Secret Room entrance, tinted rock, or a rock with a Crawl Space underneath, it will fly towards it. If there are multiple secrets, then it will fly from one to the other.

Gives Isaac a flat damage up based on how many empty Heart containers he has. The damage up given is 0.2 for each empty Red Heart container Isaac has. The damage up given is ((2 × MissingHearts) ^ 1.6) × 0.1, where MissingHearts is the number of full red hearts of health missing. The amount of damage gained this way is exponential, so each heart lost will provide a bigger bonus than the last.

Tears fire 1-2 sparks of electricity in random directions upon hitting an obstacle or enemy. Tears fire 1 short-ranged spark of electricity in a random direction upon hitting an obstacle or enemy. When an arc strikes an enemy, it will strike another nearby enemy, chaining up to four times. Sparks deal half of the tear's damage.

Shooting tears sometimes spawns a fire similar to Red Candle, damaging enemies and destroying shots it comes into contact with. Shooting tears sometimes spawns a blue fire similar to The Candle, damaging enemies and destroying shots it comes into contact with. It lasts on the ground for a limited time and can pass through obstacles.

Adds a chance to fire needles which deal triple Isaac's tear damage. Needles will instantly kill regular enemies and cause them to burst into 10 more tears in all directions. The chance to fire a needle depends on luck. The formula used to determine the chance is: \frac1 { 30 - \left \lfloor \mathit{Luck} \times 2 \right \rfloor}

Upon entering a new room, Isaac will become camouflaged and all enemies become confused. The effect will last until Isaac presses a fire button. Bosses will not be confused when Isaac is camouflaged. While camouflaged, Isaac gains +0.5 Speed.

Whenever a Devil Room/Angel Room spawns after defeating a boss, the other will also spawn. Upon entering one, the other one will disappear. Both rooms will spawn even if a devil deal was made before. In rooms without enough accessible walls, only one of the two will spawn.

Sets the Devil Room chance and Angel Room chance to 100% regardless of all other modifiers, guaranteeing an Angel Room Door will spawn whenever possible and remain open and preventing Devil Rooms from spawning.
Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac and drops a Grab Bag alternatingly every 5 or 6 rooms. ( 7 or 8 rooms).

Grants an extra Red Heart container for every 25 Penny Isaac has, up to a maximum of 4 hearts at 99 coins. Dropping below the number of coins required for a Red Heart container removes the Red Heart container.

While firing, Isaac has a chance to fire an additional creep shot that deals double damage, slows enemies, and leaves a short trail of white creep that also slows enemies. The chance is not affected by luck. The creep shots don't take on any tear effects. The creep shots are affected by range and shot speed.
Little Horn is a boss added in The Binding of Isaac: Afterbirth that can appear in all environments of Chapter 1 (Basement, Cellar, Burning Basement).

Spawns a stationary fly turret that shoots at enemies up to 3 tiles away The flies are completely invulnerable and ignored by enemies. The flies deal 2 damage per shot. The flies deal 3.5 damage per shot.
Adds a 20% chance to spawn a friendly enemy upon entering a room with enemies in it. The following enemies can spawn from Poke Go: Attack Fly Fat Bat Frowning Gaper One Tooth Pooter

When tears land on the "back" of enemies, they deal double damage and inflict bleeding. Bleeding enemies take damage equal to 10% of their maximum health every 5 seconds. Bosses cannot be inflicted with bleeding, but will still take the extra damage. Enemies bleed for 5 seconds, bleeding enemies take damage based on how quickly they move; the faster the enemy, the more damage they take.

Damages all enemies in the room. The damage dealt is equal to Isaac's current tear damage plus 10% of the enemy's max health. Has a 15% chance to drop half red hearts when it damages an enemy. May also drop half soul hearts. Half red hearts will always drop when Isaac has at least one red heart container; otherwise, half soul hearts will drop.

Grants a razor familiar that orbits Isaac. Enemies that touch the razor take damage equal to 20% of Isaac's tear damage per tick or 300% of Isaac's damage per second ( 150% of Isaac's damage per second) and start to bleed. Bleeding enemies take damage equal to 10% of their maximum health every 5 seconds. Bosses cannot bleed and won't take any damage from the razor.

Summons an orbital familiar eye that deals contact damage and occasionally fires tears that deal 3.5 damage. It also blocks enemy shots. The eye deals 2 contact damage per tick or 30 contact damage per second. Tears are fired once every 2 seconds in the direction its currently facing. The eye deals 2 contact damage per tick or 20 contact damage per second.

Upon use, spawns delirium in a form of a friendly boss for the current floor. Depending on which boss spawns, the charge time may change to be 6, 8, or 12 rooms. Changes the appearance of the current room so it looks like a different chapter. Attempting to use it a second time while a friendly boss is still alive instantly kills the first boss, spawning a second one to replace it.

Spawns a fly familiar that orbits around a random enemy and deals 2 damage per tick/30 damage per second to enemies it comes in contact with. It will occasionally make a lunge towards the enemy it is orbiting, allowing brief contact even with smaller enemies. If the enemy it is orbiting dies, it starts orbiting a different enemy.

Upon use, Isaac throws a black hole that lands on the ground and forcefully sucks in enemies and their shots, which lasts for about 6 seconds. It deals 0.4 damage per tick very rapidly to enemies in the area, for a maximum of 6 damage per second. Isaac and pickups are slightly sucked towards the black hole.
+0.1 flat damage. Grants a Soul Heart. Enemies may randomly become briefly charmed or feared. Taking damage has a 5% chance to spawn Rainbow Poop.

Enemies, enemy shots, tears and pickups will briefly freeze in place at random intervals. The frequency of the effect depends on Isaac's luck. Frozen enemy shots will disappear, but are still able to inflict damage if touched. Room clear rewards have a 25% chance to spawn a duplicate, except for chests, pills, or cards.
warunek: Complete 7 Daily Challenges (by touching the trophy at the end)

opis: Upon use, spawns a random item from the current room's item pool, with a base ~17% chance to spawn A Lump of Coal or The Poop instead.
Upon use, creates a stationary sprinkler that rotates and fires tears in 8 directions. The tears copy Isaac's stats and most tear effects.
+7 Bombs. Removes the delay between bomb placements, allowing them to be placed rapidly. Fast Bombs inflict no knockback on Isaac's bombs.

Grants a familiar with random tear effects, fire rate, and damage. The familiar's damage scales from ~2-6, and tear delay scales from ~12-30. The familiar takes the appearance of a random co-op baby. The familiar is randomized upon entering a new floor.
warunek: Pick up 5 familiars in a single run

opis: Grants a familiar that transforms into another random familiar every 10 seconds. The familiars it turns into are normal familiars that look white and melted like Delirium. Familiars deal the same damage as their normal non-Delirium counterparts. Familiars will not do contact damage.

Grants an active item charge every 15 enemies killed. Destroying a Shopkeeper will count as an enemy killed. Ultra Greed Coins enemies don't count towards the 15 to kill. Multiple copies of this item do not grant more charges.
warunek: Pick up any 2 of the following items/trinkets in a single run: 9 Volt, The Battery, Car Battery, , and ( Any 2 items that have the 'battery' item tag)

opis: On use, makes a random item in the current room that costs money or hearts free. While held, guarantees a random item or pickup from the Shop to be half price.
warunek: Purchase anything from Shops, Devil Rooms, and/or Black Markets 50 times

opis: Upon use, for the next three seconds, any enemy shots that come near Isaac are held in place. After a shot has been held for two seconds, it is fired back as a tear. Reflected tears always do 3.5 damage. When the effect is about to end, all shots are fired back. Reflected normal tears do 6 damage if they would normally do a half heart damage to Isaac.

If the box is empty, it picks up items and pickups in a room and stores them. Moving Box can carry up to 10 items or pickups at once, randomly picked (i.e. items are not prioritized). If the box is not empty, places all stored items and pickups in the current room.
warunek: Use Pandora's Box in Dark Room

opis: Connects tears with electricity that damages enemies. The electricity's damage is equal to Isaac's Damage. The electricity deals 30% of Isaac's Damage, 15 times per second, for a total of 4.5 times his damage per second. A tear can generate one connection. The tear does not generate another connection even after the connection is lost. However, other tears can still make connections with it.
warunek: Pick up any 2 technology items in a single run ( Any 2 items that have the 'tech' item tag)

opis: Upon taking damage, Isaac gains a body part as an orbital, which blocks enemy shots and deals 7 damage per tick (35 damage per second) to enemies it comes in contact with. A maximum of three body parts can be active at once. The body parts will be destroyed after dealing 30 ticks of damage and/or blocking 3 shots.

Spawns a random Harbinger familiar that changes every 10 seconds. All harbingers deal contact damage to enemies and periodically spawn locusts if Isaac currently doesn't have any, though each harbinger behaves slightly differently: Famine wanders around the room, leaves a trail of slowing black creep, deals 0.5 contact damage per tick or 15 damage per second, and spawns yellow locusts every 3 seconds that deal…

Summons a ghost near Isaac that will follow him around, and summons a controllable blue crosshair. After a few seconds, the crosshair disappears, and the ghost will act depending on what the crosshair was targeting: Items / Pickups / Trinkets / Chests / Red Chests / Spiked Chests / Mega Chests: Brings it to Isaac. Can steal from Shops, Devil Rooms, and Black Markets as well, making them effectively free.
Spawns an orbital familiar with a large orbital radius. Tears that pass through the prism split into four multi-colored tears.

Replaces Isaac's tears with eyeballs that can bounce off of each other. Isaac's tears are no longer limited by range, and will instead dissipate when they stop moving or when hitting an enemy or obstacle. Eyeball tears will start to fall to the ground after bouncing off of each other 8 times.

Upon entering a room, a skull appears over an enemy's head. The marked enemy will have bigger shadow. Killing the marked enemy will cause the skull to move to a different enemy. If all enemies in the room are cleared in the order they are marked, Isaac gains one of the following rewards at random: A Soul Heart, a pill, a Key, a Bomb, or a Nickel.

Tears are fired in an arc. Upon hitting the floor, an obstacle, or an enemy, they burst into smaller tears in all directions. The number of burst tears is random between 6-11 and they have equal chance. The scattered tears deal random damage that is 50-83.33% of the main tear. On average, they deal 66% damage.

Isaac's tears decelerate as they travel. Upon stopping or hitting an obstacle, they burst into tears that fly in all directions. Hitting an enemy will not cause them to burst. They burst into 8 tears. They burst into 5-8 tears, depending on tear size. Tears can be fired into other tears to feed them, increasing their damage and the damage of the burst tears.
warunek: Collect 10 "Tears Up" items or pills in one run

opis: Tears are replaced with piercing white blasts of light. Blasts deal 33% of the regular tear damage, but can hit the same enemy multiple times. Blasts decrease in size until disappearing. Despite the blasts decreasing in size after passing through obstacles, this is aesthetic as the blast will only damage enemies adjacent to the obstacle.
Allows Isaac to hold two active items. Swap between active items by pressing the CTRL, R2, RT, or Left Joystick.
Heals one Red Heart. Grants one Soul Heart. Upon entering a Boss Room, grants a shield that blocks one hit, then disappears.

Upon use, sacrifices up to 2 familiars and spawns an item for each familiar sacrificed. The order in which the familiars were obtained does not matter; it picks 2 at random to sacrifice. Any Blue Flies, Blue Spiders, Locusts, Clots, Dips, or Minisaacs will be converted to 1 Penny each. Wisps will be turned into Half Red Hearts each, and Item Wisps will be turned into Half Soul Hearts.

Spawns a random pill. Spawns a small Spewer familiar that charges up and fires different types of creep. The familiar and his creep change randomly when Isaac uses a pill. Possible creep includes: A line of damaging green creep that deals 0.4 damage per tick (12 damage per second). A long line of slowing black creep.
warunek: Have Isaac die to his own explosion from Ipecac, Bob's Rotten Head, or a Horf! pill

opis: Spawns 3 random trinkets. Taking damage has a 10% chance to swallow Isaac's currently held trinket, gaining its effect permanently, similar to Smelter.
warunek: Use 5 Gulp! pills in one run (Placebo uses count)

opis: Spawns an egg familiar, which cracks and turns into a random friendly monster when Isaac is hurt. The egg regenerates upon entering a different room. The usefulness of the enemy depends on how many consecutive rooms have been cleared without getting hurt.
warunek: Spawn three charmed enemies in the same room

opis: Tears bounce off the floor as they travel. Whenever a tear bounces, it creates a small splash that deals 25% of Isaac's tear damage to enemies.
Grants one Bone Heart. Spawns three Red Hearts.
warunek: Defeat Mom's Heart or It Lives! on Hard mode as The Forgotten

opis: Spawns a bone familiar that circles around Isaac and reflects enemy shots. The reflected projectiles deal 5 damage if they would've hurt Isaac for half a heart, and 10 for a full heart. The reflected projectiles deal 6 damage if they would've hurt Isaac for half a heart, and 7 for a full heart. Enemy damage modification from item effects or by stage does not affect the reflected damage.

Spawns a white poop familiar, which turns into a White Poop when Isaac is hurt. White Poop has an aura that multiplies both fire rate and tear delay by x2.5 and has a 50% chance to ignore damage similarly to Cone Head except the chance is higher. White Poop has similar durability to golden poop. The aura additionally increases damage by 20% and gives Isaac's tears a homing effect.

Spawns a bone familiar that can be aimed with the fire buttons in all directions and does contact damage. The familiar will continuously hover back and forth in the direction that it is pointing in. The damage is equal to Isaac's tear damage and is dealt 6 times per second.

When used, spawns one of the following for each enemy already killed in the current room: An orbital bone familiar (very common). A friendly Bony (uncommon). A friendly Bone Fly (uncommon). A friendly Black Bony (rare). A friendly Revenant (rare). The chance to spawn Revenants is greatly increased in Mausoleum / Gehenna / Sheol / Dark Room.

Creates a ring of light around Isaac that petrifies enemies on contact. Normal enemies stay permanently petrified as long as they are within the ring, whereas bosses get a standard petrification effect that stays even outside the ring but isn't permanent.
warunek: Defeat Ultra Greedier as The Forgotten

opis: Grants one Bone Heart. +0.7 tears. Spawns if it has been unlocked and not previously encountered during the run.
warunek: Complete the Boss Rush as The Forgotten

opis: Spawns a familiar that fires across the room in the direction of the first tear fired and returns to Isaac when it hits a wall, similar to Little Chubby. Deals a flat 7 damage to enemies that come in contact with it. When thrown, the familiar will pierce through some fly enemies, instantly killing them, but will instantly bounce back upon hitting other enemies.

Grants 6 empty Bone Hearts. Removes all current Red Heart. Does not remove existing Bone Hearts, but does empty them. Upon losing a Bone Heart, including ones acquired from other sources, Isaac fires a ring of 8 bones that split into more bones. Each Bone Heart lost adds a permanent +0.5 tears up. Each Bone Heart lost adds a permanent +0.4 fire rate, which can break the tear fire rate cap.
warunek: Defeat The Lamb as The Forgotten

opis: While held, 1–2 Mom's feet will stomp randomly every few seconds, targeting Isaac. They will try to stomp Isaac's current position, so they will always miss if he is constantly moving. Each stomp deals a full Heart of damage. The stomps will not blow up s or kill s. They will still destroy Shopkeepers, open Bomb Chests, break Obstacles, and open doors.

While held, 1–2 Mom's feet will stomp randomly every few seconds, targeting Isaac. They will try to stomp Isaac's current position, so they will always miss if he is constantly moving. Each stomp deals a full Heart of damage. The stomps will not blow up s or kill s. They will still destroy Shopkeepers, open Bomb Chests, break Obstacles, and open doors.

Upon activation, creates a trapdoor that leads to the next floor or to a Crawl Space, identical to We Need To Go Deeper!. Using this on a dirt patch that appears in Grave Rooms in Dark Room will unlock The Forgotten. Once the Forgotten is unlocked, digging into dirt patches will instead spawn a random type of Chest.

Gives Isaac a 25% chance to shoot a spore that, in addition to dealing damage, will stick to enemies. The chance is not affected by Luck.https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/15K8Xgxoxdx68AIaxuLXgZoJJlG36UPgy3_aeDpAM5tU/edit?usp=sharing Spores will explode 2.5 seconds after sticking to an enemy, dealing 5 damage to and poisoning nearby enemies and firing four more spores in a cross pattern.
Applies fear to enemies in a small radius around Isaac.
Grants 5 Penny on first pickup. When used, consumes 5 Penny and grants +1.2 damage for the rest of the room. The effect can be stacked. If Isaac has fewer than 5 coins, nothing happens.
warunek: In a single run, obtain 99 Coins, then spend all of them

opis: Upon activation, Isaac is turned into a demon and gains the effects of Brimstone for the current room. If Sulfur has already been used in the current room, it instead gives Isaac a 1.2x damage multiplier, +1 damage, and increases the size of the laser for the current room. Further uses of Sulfur will increase Isaac's damage by 1.

Gives Isaac a fortune, Soul Heart, Card, Rune, or trinket, similar to a . Fortunes are much more likely to be given than anything else. {| class="wikitable striped" ! Pickup ! Chance This table is based on a sample of 1000 trials, rounded to the nearest 0.5%. -->
When Isaac shoots, he has a chance to fire 1-3 additional tears in random directions. The chance to fire extra tears is unaffected by luck.

Repeatedly zaps enemies that are in close proximity to Isaac with electricity beams for light damage. Enemies can be zapped up to five times per second, with each zap dealing 0.75× Isaac's damage. Each zap can hit up to 4 enemies, if they are sufficiently close to each other.

Taking damage causes Isaac to release a ring of 10 tears and gain tears up for the current room. The first hit taken increases Isaac's tears fired per second by 1.2, then by 0.4 for every subsequent hit in the same room. This ignores the tears cap and can stack indefinitely. Each tear in the ring deals 10 damage and doesn't use Isaac's tear effects.

cytat: DMG down + tears up + you feel nutty
opis: Quadruples fire rate / tear delay. ×0.3 damage multiplier. -0.16 tear size. Each tear gains the effects of either , , , , , , , , , , Rubber Cement, My Reflection or Tiny Planet at random. These inherit the movement, shot speed, range, and spectral effects, but not changes to tears or damage.

Prevents Isaac's attributes from falling below their highest values reached. Attributes continue to be calculated normally internally. Rather than use Isaac's current stats, items and effects will impact Isaac the same way they would as if he did not have Rock Bottom.
warunek: Complete Boss Rush as Jacob and Esau

opis: Grants 5 bombs. Causes Isaac's bombs to gain the effects of 1-4 random bomb synergies (most commonly 1). Aside from normal bomb synergy items, this also includes , Strange Attractor, and Golden Bombs (golden bombs will not be free).
+0.5 Tears. +0.2 Shot Speed.

Spawns a familiar that chases nearby enemies and deals 2 contact damage to them per tick (~8.57 per second). After killing 15 enemies, Blood Puppy becomes angry, and changes in the following ways: Deals 7.5 damage per tick instead of 2 (15 per second, or 90 per second while charging). Charges at enemies that are aligned with it in the cardinal directions.

During the transition between floors, Isaac's nightmare shows the item that will be found in the Treasure Room and what Boss will be at the end of the floor. In Greed mode or Greedier mode, the first item shown during the transition will be of the item inside the silver Treasure Room, while the second one in the actual locked one.

Gives Isaac a candle familiar that grants a Fire Rate bonus of +0.4 for each room cleared in a row without taking damage, which stacks up to 5 times (Max. +2 Fire Rate), represented by how brightly the flame burns. Starts at 1 stack, and resets to zero if damage is taken.

Double tapping a fire key creates a Divine Shield that slowly moves in the chosen direction. The Divine Shield has a variety of effects. Enemies are pushed back in the opposite direction, completely reversing their trajectory with some added momentum. If they hit a wall or obstacle while being pushed, they take 10 damage and deal 10 damage to enemies they hit. The damages are increased by 2 for each floor.

Spawns a familiar that stabs Isaac at the beginning of each floor if Isaac has more than a half red heart. This drains as much red health as possible without killing him, leaving a half red heart if Isaac only had red health, or none at all if Isaac has soul/black/bone hearts. For the rest of the floor, Isaac gains extra damage and speed for each heart lost.

Every tear has a different color and different corresponding effect. One of the following effects can be granted: Brown: None Red: 2x damage, Fire Mind, or Petrify Pink: Charm Purple: Homing or Dark Blue: chance for Proptosis tears Does not gain 3x damage, effectively making it a damage down. Light Blue: Slow, and Freeze on kill

cytat: Speed up + your feet feel stronger
opis: Gives Isaac +0.3 speed and 2 soul hearts. Isaac becomes immune to spikes and creep.

cytat: DMG up + range up + controlled tears
opis: Firing in a direction causes all of Isaac's tears to move in that direction. Tears will stay in place if a fire button is not being pressed. The flight duration of tears is determined by the range stat. +1 damage. +2.0 range. -0.16 shot speed.

Isaac will frequently fire extra spectral tears that orbit around him until they hit the ground, similar to Tiny Planet. These tears mimic Isaac's in most cases. x1.2 damage multiplier. This multiplier does not stack with multiple Immaculate Hearts. Adds one Red Heart Container and fully replenishes Isaac's health.

Gives Isaac a large pulsing aura around him that deals damage to enemies inside of it. The aura deals more damage the closer enemies are to Isaac, ranging from 0.4 on the edge up to 3.9 + 0.3 * floor damage. The aura deals damage up to 7.5 times per second.

Gives Isaac a spider familiar that burrows in Isaac's head, firing four slowing tears in addition to Isaac's normal tears. The slowing tears deal 1.5 damage each, and fired every 1.5 seconds. These tears are unaffected by Isaac's damage and tears stats; they have fixed damage and fire rate.

Converts all enemy Dips and Drips into Dip Familiars. Rocks have a chance to be replaced with poop when generated. The formula to calculate the chance is: \color{white}\mathit{Chance} = \mathit{Luck} \times 0.5 + 6.25, capped at 10% at 7.5 Luck. Destroying poops spawn 1-4 Dip Familiars, which loosely follow Isaac around, block enemy shots, and deal contact damage to enemies.

cytat: A king's fortune... but at what cost?
opis: Upon use, summons a sword that hangs directly above Isaac. As long as the sword hangs above Isaac, all item pedestals are doubled, spawning an additional free item next to them. Items spawned via other means, like Machines, s, and certain items and cards, are also doubled. The extra item will be pulled from the current room's item pool, even if the original item is from a different pool (ex.
warunek: Defeat The Lamb as Jacob and Esau

opis: Spawns a pool of Lemonade similar to the Lemon Party pill effect underneath Isaac. The creep deals 8 damage per tick (24 per second) and lasts ~19 seconds.

Replaces Isaac's tears with a sword he can swing in front of him. The swing does 3x Isaac's damage +3.5 and deals knockback to both enemies and Isaac if it hits. The sword can be swung as rapidly as the fire button can be tapped. The sword swing can collect pickups.

Allows Isaac to create a Red Room by using it next to a wall where there would be no conditions that could prevent a room from spawning there (i.e., the same conditions for a Secret Room to spawn). This is indicated by red door outlines on walls.

Spawns a fly orbital familiar that chases and blocks enemy shots. After a certain amount of shots are blocked, it enters a short cooldown period where it still blocks shots, but does not actively chase them. Psy Fly also deals 1 contact damage to enemies per tick (15 per second). Instantly kills some Fly enemies upon contact.

cytat: Tears up. A mind changing experience!
opis: Gives Isaac +0.75 fire rate which goes past the normal cap, -0.03 speed, and distorts the screen and background music. The effects can be stacked in the same room, and the distortion becomes more pronounced with repeated use. After repeated uses, the colors begin to turn very bright and intense.

Adds 5 bombs. If any firing input is given when placing a bomb, a fast-moving, explosive rocket will be shot in the direction corresponding to the input. The rockets accept analog firing input. This means they can be shot diagonally or in any other angle with a mouse or joystick, even without Analog Stick.

On use, spawns a wisp that orbits Isaac and fires small spectral tears alongside him. The wisps can block shots and deal contact damage to enemies, but take damage when doing so and will be destroyed when enough damage is taken. When a wisp is destroyed, the sound of fire being extinguished plays. A normal wisp is white and blue, has 2 health and spectral tears which deal 3 damage, and is summoned in the middle ring.

This item starts with no charges. Rather than gaining charges by clearing rooms or picking up batteries, Alabaster Box has to be charged through Soul Heart or Black Heart. Instead of being added to Isaac's health bar, they charge the box at a rate of one charge per half heart. Both Soul or Black Hearts that are picked up, or directly added to Isaac's health will count towards Alabaster Box's charges.

cytat: May you get what you came for
opis: At the start of every floor, generates a ladder which leads to a special Angel Room Shop, regardless of whether a devil deal has been taken. These angel shops always contain the following: Three items/pickups for sale. These items/pickups can be on sale, just like with normal Shops. An item from the Angel Room Item Pool for 15 or 30 pennies.
warunek: Defeat Isaac as Jacob and Esau

opis: Shows the location of the Boss Room on the minimap. After killing the boss in the Boss room shown on the map, has the following effects: Activates the effect of XIX - The Sun. Gives Isaac +3 damage and +1 luck for the rest of the floor. Fully recharges Isaac's active item. Removes any Curses from the current floor except the Curse of the Labyrinth.

cytat: The moon's blessing shines upon you
opis: Adds an extra Secret Room and Super Secret Room to each floor. Reveals one random Secret Room on the map on pickup and at the start of each floor. Each newly discovered Secret Room has a shining beam of light that will raise tears for the current floor and gives Isaac a Half Soul Heart when walked under.
+0.4 speed. Opens most doors after entering a room, even in rooms with enemies, allowing Isaac to leave at any time.
Grants one Red Heart Container. Heals 1 additional Red heart. Charms enemies close to Isaac. The effect wears off quickly after enemies move away from Isaac.

+1 damage. Isaac's tears become rocks that have extra knockback and have a chance to destroy obstacles (including walls to Secret Rooms, the mirror in Downpour/Dross, entrances to Mines/Ashpit and Bedrooms, and normal closed doors). Rock tears randomly deal increased/decreased damage, ranging between ×0.5 and ×2 Isaac's damage per tear.

Double tapping a direction makes Isaac quickly dash in that direction. Isaac is immune to damage from all sources during the dash, with the exception of s, s, and similar self-damage active items. The dash deals damage equal to 4× Isaac's damage + 8. The direction of the dash can be changed by holding another button.

Grants two filled Red Heart containers. -0.3 Speed. Standing still causes Isaac to build up speed at a rate of +0.25 per second, up to a +0.5 speed bonus. Isaac charges up while standing still. Moving releases a fart cloud behind Isaac, damaging and inflicting Poison on enemies that pass through it and draining the speed buff at a rate of -0.25 speed per second.

A circle surrounds Isaac. When entering a room, the circle is filled with 7 orbiting tears that copy Isaac's tear properties. The tears will deal 1.5× Isaac's damage +5 flat damage. After 13 seconds, the tears will automatically fall to the ground. Orbiting tears are spectral, although they don't visually appear to be.

Isaac's tears become icicles that freeze enemies upon death, turning them into ice statues. Bosses and mini-bosses cannot be frozen. Frozen enemies can be kicked, sliding and leaving damaging creep across the room and shattering when they hit a wall, obstacle or an enemy, releasing 10 icicle tears in a circle.

When Isaac is not firing tears, a charge bar will start to fill up. Holding down the fire button will release all stored tears in rapid succession. The charge time and maximum tears per charge scale with Isaac's tears stat, with higher tears charging faster and having more.
+0.7 tears Significantly shrinks Isaac, allowing him to squeeze between objects and makes some enemy shots pass over him.

Spawns an additional Curse Room on each floor, if possible. Doesn't work on the Ascent. Doesn't work on the First Floor if its a starting item (e.g. as Eden). Curse rooms have improved layouts and rewards while Voodoo Head is held. A coin is guaranteed to spawn in Curse Rooms.

Increases the fire rate of tears fired from Isaac's left eye by 40%. The difference in fire rates causes Isaac's tears to be fired at a staggered rate. The first shot in a while is always a double shot.

+0.7 tears up. Grants an Eternal Heart. Allows Angel Rooms to spawn even after Isaac has taken a Deal with the Devil. Increases the chance for a deal to appear by 40% if Isaac has taken Red Heart damage, and an additional 15% if Red Heart damage was taken against the boss.

Spawns a trapdoor in each Shop that leads to an additional underground shop that can sell 2-5 of the following: A Trinket for 15 cents. An Item for 15-30 cents. Items will be from the Secret Room, Shop, Devil/Angel Room, or Boss Room items; there can be multiple items from different item pools, but items will stay to their chosen item pool if rerolled.
warunek: Spend 40+ coins in a single Shop

opis: Fully charges the current activated item. Spawns 2-4 random battery pickups.

Upon use, picks up the obstacle in front of Isaac. The obstacle can be thrown at enemies, dealing 40 damage and breaking on impact, dropping any contents they may contain. Obstacles can be carried between rooms. Using it on a Host will lift the shell off and transform it into a Red Host. Isaac can throw the shell after picking it up.

Summons The Peeper for the current room, which also leaves a trail of red creep. The Peeper deals 12 contact damage per tick (36 per second) and the creep it trails deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second). The Peeper can block enemy shots. All tears shot from the right eye will deal 35% more damage, same as with The Peeper affecting the left eye.

Gives Isaac a chance to fire tears that create rifts where they land, which damage nearby enemies and pull in enemies, pickups, and tears/shots from all sources for 2 seconds. Rifts deal 0.5x Isaac's damage twice each tick (3x Isaac's damage per second), and enemy shots pulled into the rift will damage other enemies.

Gives Isaac a familiar that fires chaotic bursts of tears in all directions at random intervals while in a room with enemies, shooting faster the closer it is to an enemy, similarly to Boils. Each tear fired by Boiled Baby does either 3.5 or 5.3 damage, with no in-between.

Gives Isaac a familiar that shoots icicles that have a chance to petrify enemies they hit and freeze enemies they kill. Icicles deal 3.5 damage, and are fired once every 3/4ths of a second. Frozen enemies will block enemy shots, and will slide away when walked into by Isaac.
Upon use, replaces every pedestal item in the current room with other random items corresponding to the current room's item pool. Each pedestal item rerolled has a 25% chance to disappear.

Gives Isaac a fat bird familiar that sits on Isaac's head until he takes damage. Upon taking damage, it will jump off of Isaac's head and land on the nearest enemy, dealing damage and creating a rock line in a random direction. For the rest of the room, it acts like Dead Bird, flying around, albeit slower, and dealing contact damage to enemies.

Isaac shouts, damaging and pushing away nearby enemies. The item can be used when not fully charged, and deals more damage and has increased range the more charges it has when used. The initial shout deals 20 damage + 28 per charge and destroys enemy shots, obstacles, Shopkeepers, s, and machines, and opens bombable doors in range.
warunek: Defeat The Beast as Tainted Samson

opis: Creates a ghostly familiar that closely follows behind Isaac. It dies in one hit, respawning at the start of the next floor. If Lost Soul survives until the start of the next floor, it rewards Isaac with one of the following: 3 Soul Hearts. 2 Eternal Hearts. A Treasure Room item or an Angel Room item.

Grants one full Red Heart container. Restores 4 Red Hearts. Causes Isaac's bombs to leave a pool of red creep on the ground when they explode. The creep deals 2 damage per tick (20 per second) and lasts 15 seconds. Leaves one large creep in the middle, and four small creeps on random direction and distance.

Gives Isaac a Dumpy familiar, which follows behind him. When Isaac is about to take damage (as with ), Lil Dumpy farts, pushing nearby enemies and shots away. Enemies that collide with obstacles or walls take damage. Pushed shots that hit an enemy deal 7 damage. Lil Dumpy has a larger, hidden secondary radius that may randomly trigger its fart effect if an enemy projectile enters it.

Gives Isaac a chance to shoot fires alongside his regular tears that block enemy shots and deal damage to enemies that touch them, similar to those shot by Red Candle. Fires can block up to four shots and/or deal four ticks of damage before being destroyed, and last up to 10 seconds.

Gives Isaac the chance to fire tears that magnetize enemies they hit, giving them properties similar to tears fired by Isaac when he has Strange Attractor: Enemies and pickups that are near magnetized enemies are pulled towards them. This includes live bombs. All tears/enemy shots (from Isaac, his familiars, and all enemies, including the magnetized one) will be strongly pulled towards magnetized enemies.

Adds a chance to fire tears that mark enemies with the Bait status effect. Enemies marked as bait will move slower and be attacked by other enemies until it is killed or the effect wears off. Tears that apply the effect are red.

Grants a passive ability that varies from character to character.
